case_title: CAPITAL FINANCIAL CREDIT, LLC VS. ANDREA WU et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-28-2007 CONTINUED TO DEC-28-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
